Model Builder

Instantiation Dialog

Contains the GUI logic for the Instantiation dialog.

class InstantiationDlg(var_data_all: List[VariableInfo], common_entity: Optional[Entity], variables: Dict[str, Variable], single_node: bool, parent: Optional[QWidget] = None)[source]

Implementation of the logic for the insantiation dialog.

ui

Contains the GUI widgets, obtained from QtDesigner.

Type

object

common_entity

Stores the information about the entity linked to the nodes to be instantiated (only for a full instantiation). None if partial instantiation is going to be done instead.

Type

entity.Entity

variables

Stores the information about all variables in the ontology.

Type

dict

var_data

Contains one list for variables that need to be initialized and another for the rest. Each of these lists contain tuples of two items:

  • var_info (dict): Data of a single variable with the following fields:

    • id (str): The variable id.

    • same_in_all_nodes (bool): True if the variable has been instantiated with the same value in all nodes or has not been instantiated in any. False otherwise.

    • value (Optional[float]): The value of the variable if it has been instantiated with the same value in all nodes. None otherwise.

  • is_enabled (bool): True if the user is able to interact with the item. False otherwise.

Type

list[list[tuples]]

lists

Contains the QListWidgets in the interface.

Type

list[QListWidget]

tab_index_selected

Stores the index of the active tab.

Type

int

__init__(var_data_all: List[VariableInfo], common_entity: Optional[Entity], variables: Dict[str, Variable], single_node: bool, parent: Optional[QWidget] = None)[source]

Initializes the InstantiationDlg with the required information.

Parameters

  • parent (QWidget) – Parent widget of the dialog. Defaults to None.

  • var_data_all (list[dict]) –

    Each element contains the data of a single variable with the following fields:

    • id (int): The variable id.

    • same_in_all_nodes (bool): True if the variable has been instantiated with the same value in all nodes or has not been instantiated in any. False otherwise.

    • value (float or None): The value of the variable if it has been instantiated with the same value in all nodes. None otherwise.

    Defaults to [].

  • entity (dict) – Stores the information about the entity linked to the nodes to be instantiated (only for a full instantiation). None if partial instantiation is going to be done instead. Defaults to None.

  • variables (dict) – Stores the information about all variables in the ontology. Defaults to None.

  • single_node (bool) – True if the instantiation will be done for a single node. False otherwise. Defaults to True.

_tab_changed(current_tab_index: int) → None[source]

Controls the tab change.

Parameters

tab_index (int) – Index of the active tab.

_update_list() → None[source]

Updates the current QListWidget with the current info.

_update_tab_title() → None[source]

Update the first tab title when needed.

The title will be in the form: “Required Variables (#)” where # is an integer representing how many variables are still required to be instantiated.

_set_instantiation_state(is_allowed: bool) → None[source]

Controls the use of GUI widgets related to the instantiation.

Parameters

is_allowed (bool) – True to allow interaction with the text box and the instantiate button. Also, the name of the selected variable will be displayed in the variable name label. False to disable with the text box and the instantiate button. In this case the label will show a “?” sign.

_variable_selected(item_pos: int) → None[source]

Prepares the necessary widgets when a variable is selected.

Also warns the user when a variable with different values in different nodes will be instantiated.

Parameters

item_pos (int) – Position in the QListWidget of the selected variable. It corresponds to the index in the proper var_data list.

_instantiate() → None[source]

Controls the instantiation process.

Saves the new value for the selected variable. If the variable instantiated is not one of the required ones a new analisis is performed to check what variables are still needed and can still be instantiated.

_add_new_item_to_list(parent_list: QListWidget, item_name: str, is_enabled: bool) → None[source]

Adds a new item to a QListWidget.

Uses flags to control some of the item properties.

Parameters

  • list (QListWidget) – Widget where the item will be inserted.

  • item_name (string) – Name of the item to be inserted. Already includes the variable name and its value.

  • is_enabled (bool) – True if the user is able to interact with the item. False otherwise.

_update_enabled_vars()[source]

Checks what variables are still needed.

A new VarEq tree is generated. Variables that do not require instantiation but still get instantiated will not need equations anymore. These equations are added to the entity’s original blocked equations and the tree is constructed from there.
